text: Iliad (Troy) trailer made by Grok Imagine 1.5, which was just released https://t.co/o0zITVlvpn
summary: Iliad (Troy) trailer made by Grok Imagine 1.5, which was just released
ai_summary: Elon Musk announces the release of Grok Imagine 1.5, xAI's multimodal AI model capable of generating video content, demonstrated through an AI-generated Iliad (Troy) trailer. This showcases xAI's progress in generative AI capabilities and represents a competitive development in the AI/ML space alongside text generation, indicating advancement in xAI's product roadmap and technical capabilities.
embed_html:
Iliad (Troy) trailer made by Grok Imagine 1.5, which was just released pic.twitter.com/o0zITVlvpn

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) June 4, 2026

ai_summary: Elon Musk promotes Grok Voice, xAI's conversational AI product with voice capabilities. This represents a product launch/feature announcement for xAI's Grok platform, demonstrating the company's expansion into voice-based AI interfaces to compete in the broader AI assistant market alongside OpenAI's ChatGPT and Google's offerings.
